igbo.design_5_fossil_energy_mix: Hazie ngwakọta ike nwere <5% mmanụ fossil
igbo.get_ai_analysis_of_your_mix: Nweta nyocha AI nke ngwakọta gị
igbo.set_5_detailed_habit_sliders: Tọọ slider àgwà 5+ nwere nkọwa zuru ezu
igbo.build_a_solution_mix_totaling_200_gt: Wuo ngwakọta ngwọta nwere mkpokọta 200+ Gt
igbo.how_do_you_get_to_school: Kedu ka ị si aga akwụkwọ?
igbo.walk_bike: Ịga ije / Igwe kwụ otu ebe
igbo.zero_emissions_your_legs_are_the_green: Efu nkpọ! Ụkwụ gị bụ engine kacha akwụkwọ ndụ.
igbo.shared_ride_about_0_3_kg_co_per_studen: Njem nkekọrịta — ihe dị ka 0.3 kg CO₂ kwa nwa akwụkwọ kwa njem.
igbo.a_car_emits_0_21_kg_co_km_solo_trips_a: Ụgbọ ala na-ewepụta ~0.21 kg CO₂/km. Njem naanị gị na-agbakọ ngwa ngwa.
igbo.splitting_rides_cuts_per_person_emissi: Ikekọrịta njem na-ebelata nkpọ kwa mmadụ 50-75%.
igbo.fruits_veggies_grains_beans_lowest_foo: Mkpụrụ osisi, akwụkwọ nri, mkpụrụ, agwa — nzọụkwụ nri kacha ala.
igbo.some_meat_some_veggies_average_diet: Anụ ntakịrị, akwụkwọ nri ntakịrị. Nri nkezi.
igbo.lots_of_meat_dairy: Anụ na mmiri ara ehi buru ibu
igbo.beef_produces_60_kg_co_per_kg_of_meat: Anụ ehi na-emepụta 60 kg CO₂ kwa kg anụ.
igbo.near_zero_operational_emissions: Nkpọ ọrụ dị nso na efu.
igbo.us_grid_0_4_kg_co_per_kwh: Grid US: ~0.4 kg CO₂ kwa kWh.
igbo.coal_heavy_grids_up_to_1_kg_co_kwh: Grid nwere coal hiri nne: ruo 1 kg CO₂/kWh.
igbo.composting_diverts_methane_producing_w: Ime compost na-atụgharị mkpofu na-emepụta methane.
igbo.recycling_saves_1_ton_co_per_ton_of_ma: Imegharị na-echekwa ~ton 1 CO₂ kwa ton nke ihe.
igbo.landfills_produce_methane_28_more_pote: Ebe mkpofu na-emepụta methane (dị ike 28× karịa CO₂).
igbo.typical_us_gas_car_0_21_kg_co_e_km: Ụgbọ mmanụ US nkịtị: 0.21 kg CO₂e/km.
igbo.carpool_of_3_cuts_per_person_emissions: Nkekọrịta mmadụ atọ na-ebelata nkpọ kwa mmadụ 65%.
igbo.electric_rail_is_4_cleaner_than_a_car: Ụzọ okporo ígwè eletrik dị ọcha 4× karịa ụgbọ ala.
igbo.improves_as_the_grid_decarbonizes: Na-akawanye mma ka grid na-ewepụ carbon.
igbo.zero_emissions_also_health_benefits: Efu nkpọ. Uru ahụ ike kwa.
igbo.aviation_has_2_3_warming_impact_beyond: Ụgbọ elu nwere mmetụta ọkụ 2-3× karịa naanị CO₂.
igbo.one_long_haul_round_trip_3_tons_a_year: Otu njem ogologo nlaghachi = ~ton 3 — otu afọ ịnya ụgbọ ala nye ọtụtụ mmadụ.
igbo.60_kg_co_e_per_kg_of_beef_highest_of_a: 60 kg CO₂e kwa kg anụ ehi — kacha elu n'ime nri niile.
igbo.second_highest_emitter_after_beef: Nke abụọ kacha ewepụta, mgbe anụ ehi gasịrị.
igbo.varies_farmed_salmon_higher_wild_cod_l: Ọ na-adịgasị iche: salmon a zụlịtara dị elu, cod ọhịa dị ala.
igbo.about_1_10_the_impact_of_a_beef_meal: Ihe dị ka 1/10 nke mmetụta nri anụ ehi.
igbo.beans_rice_veggies_lowest_possible_foo: Agwa + osikapa + akwụkwọ nri = nzọụkwụ kacha ala enwere ike.
igbo.disposable_cups_add_50_vs_home_brewed: Iko a na-atụfu na-agbakwụnye ~50% karịa nke a kwadere n'ụlọ.
igbo.food_waste_8_of_global_emissions: Mkpofu nri = 8% nke nkpọ ụwa niile.
igbo.natural_gas_2_kg_therm_winter_only: Gas okike: ~2 kg/therm. Naanị oge oyi.
igbo.us_grid_average_lower_in_ca_higher_in_: Nkezi grid US; dị ala na CA, dị elu na WV.
igbo.4_more_efficient_than_gas_furnace: Ọ dị mma 4× karịa furnace gas.
igbo.shorter_shower_linear_savings: Ịsa ahụ dị mkpụmkpụ = nchekwa kwụ ọtọ.
igbo.laundry_load_warm_wash: Otu ibu ákwà (ịsa ọkụ dị nro)
igbo.netflix_2023_report_lower_than_older_e: Akụkọ Netflix 2023 — dị ala karịa atụmatụ ochie.
igbo.3g_co_e_per_text_prompt_long_context_1: ~3g CO₂e kwa prompt ederede. Ajụjụ ọnọdụ ogologo (1M token) na-efu ~3× karịa.
igbo.dall_e_midjourney_stable_diffusion_10_: DALL-E / Midjourney / Stable Diffusion: ~10–30g kwa onyonyo. Dị arọ 5–10× karịa ederede.
igbo.sora_runway_kling_100_500g_per_clip_sc: Sora / Runway / Kling: ~100–500g kwa clip. Na-abawanye kwụ ọtọ na ogologo clip + resolution. Dị arọ 50×+ karịa ederede.
igbo.elevenlabs_murf_openai_tts_1_3g_per_sh: ElevenLabs / Murf / OpenAI TTS: ~1–3g kwa clip dị mkpụmkpụ.
igbo.copilot_cursor_claude_code_long_contex: Copilot / Cursor / Claude Code: prompt koodu ọnọdụ ogologo ~5g nke ọ bụla.
igbo.polyester_lifetime_of_oil_extraction: Polyester = ndụ dum nke mmịpụta mmanụ.
igbo.keep_phones_3_years_to_halve_annual_im: Debe ekwentị afọ 3+ iji belata mmetụta afọ n'ọkara.
igbo.2_day_shipping_3_slower_shipping: Mbupu ụbọchị 2 = 3× nke mbupu dị nwayọọ.
igbo.landfills_produce_methane_28_more_pote_2: Ebe mkpofu na-emepụta methane (dị ike 28× karịa CO₂).
igbo.avoids_methane_and_builds_soil_carbon: Na-ezere methane MA na-ewu carbon ala.
igbo.tap_water_500_cleaner_emissions_wise: Mmiri paịpụ = dị ọcha ~500× n'ihe gbasara nkpọ.
igbo.what_every_person_needs_to_reach_by_20: Ihe onye ọ bụla kwesịrị iru ka ọ na-erule 2030 iji nọrọ n'okpuru 1.5°C.
igbo.near_net_zero_mix: Ngwakọta Dị Nso na Efu Zuru Ezu
igbo.cities_like_burlington_vt_already_run_: Obodo dị ka Burlington, Vermont na-arụ ọrụ na eletrik nwughari 100% ugbua!
igbo.a_diverse_portfolio_is_the_most_resili: Portfolio dị iche iche bụ ụzọ kacha adịgide.
igbo.denmark_gets_55_of_electricity_from_wi: Denmark na-enweta 55% nke eletrik ya site n'ifufe ugbua.
igbo.the_world_adds_renewables_faster_than_: Ụwa na-agbakwụnye ike nwughari ngwa ngwa karịa mgbe ọ bụla.
igbo.us_environmental_justice: Ikpe Ziri Ezi Gbasara Gburugburu US
igbo.southeast_asia_coastal: Ụsọ Oké Osimiri Ndịda Ọwụwa Anyanwụ Eshia
igbo.stable_for_10_000_years_holocene_clima: Kwụsiri ike afọ 10,000. Ihu igwe Holocene ebe mmepeanya mmadụ niile toro.
igbo.charles_david_keeling_begins_continuou: Charles David Keeling malitere nlekọta CO₂ na-aga n'ihu na Mauna Loa. Curve ya gosiri na ọkụ mmadụ kpatara bụ eziokwu.
igbo.climate_scientist_james_hansen_tells_u: Ọkà mmụta ihu igwe James Hansen gwara Congress US na ọkụ amalitela. 350.org na-ele 350 ppm dị ka oke “echekwara”.
igbo.first_time_atmospheric_co_crossed_400_: Oge mbụ CO₂ ikuku gabigara 400 ppm n'ime afọ nde 3+. Oge ikpeazụ nke 400 ppm nke Ụwa: ọhịa okpomọkụ na isi ụwa.
igbo.current_level_highest_in_at_least_800_: Ọkwa ugbu a. Kacha elu n'opekempe afọ 800,000 (site na cores ice). Nha na ~1.2°C ọkụ.
igbo.threshold_associated_with_2_c_warming_: Oke jikọtara na ọkụ 2°C ma ọ na-adịgide. Ebumnuche Nkwekọrịta Paris: nọrọ n'okpuru 1.5°C.
igbo.mass_coral_bleaching_events_hit_the_gr: Omume ịcha coral buru ibu tiri Great Barrier Reef na 2016, 2017, 2020, 2022, na 2024. Na ọkụ 1.5°C, 70–90% nke coral reefs okpomọkụ na-anwụ. Na 2°C, 99% na-anwụ.
igbo.the_greenland_ice_sheet_holds_enough_w: Mpempe ice Greenland nwere mmiri zuru ezu iji welie ọkwa oké osimiri mita 7 (23 ft). Na ~1.5°C na-adịgide, mgbaze na-aghọ nke a na-apụghị ịgbanwe kemgbe narị afọ ruo puku afọ.
igbo.the_atlantic_meridional_overturning_ci: Mgbagharị AMOC na-ebugharị okpomọkụ site na okpomọkụ ruo Europe. Ọ dara mba 15% kemgbe 1950. Nkwụsị zuru ezu ga-eme ka ugwu Europe dịkwuo oyi nke ukwuu ma na-akpaghasị monsoon na Afrịka na Eshia.
igbo.the_amazon_generates_half_its_own_rain: Amazon na-emepụta ọkara mmiri ozuzo nke ya. Site na igbutu ọhịa 20–25% + okpomọkụ na-arịwanye elu, ọ dị ihe egwu ịtụgharị site n'ọhịa mmiri ruo savanna. Ụfọdụ nnyocha na-egosi na oke dị nso na 2°C na ọnụọgụ igbutu ọhịa ugbu a.
igbo.arctic_permafrost_holds_twice_the_carb: Permafrost Arctic nwere carbon okpukpu abụọ nke dị ugbu a na ikuku. N'ịkpo ọkụ 3–4× ọsọ karịa nkezi ụwa, ọ na-agbazerị ma na-ahapụ CO₂ na methane (dị ike 28× karịa CO₂ n'ime afọ 100).
igbo.marine_based_ice_sheets_anchored_below: Mpempe ice dabeere n'oké osimiri nke a rapaara n'okpuru ọkwa oké osimiri. Mmiri oké osimiri na-ekpo ọkụ na-eripịa ha site n'okpuru. Glacier Thwaites (“Doomsday Glacier”) bụ isi ihe egwu. Ọdịda ga-eme ka ọkwa oké osimiri rịgoo mita 3.3 (11 ft).
igbo.northern_coniferous_forests_russia_can: Ọhịa conifer ugwu (Russia, Canada, Scandinavia) nọ n'okpuru nrụgide site na ọkụ, ebe mkpịsị osisi, na ọkụ ọhịa. Ntụgharị zuru ezu ruo ala ahịhịa nwere ike ịhapụ carbon dị ukwuu echekwara.
igbo.gulf_of_maine_rapid_warming: Ọkụ Ngwa Ngwa nke Gulf of Maine
igbo.the_gulf_of_maine_has_warmed_faster_th: Gulf of Maine ekpola ọkụ ngwa ngwa karịa 99% nke oké osimiri ụwa kemgbe 1980 — ihe dị ka 0.5°F kwa afọ iri, ihe dị ka 3× nke nkezi oké osimiri ụwa. Iyi oyi Labrador adaala mba ka mmiri ọkụ Gulf Stream na-eru ugwu karịa, na-ahazigharị netwọọkụ nri n'oge dị adị site na ntọala. Obodo ụsọ oké osimiri Penobscot, Passamaquoddy, Maliseet, na Mi’kmaq edekọọla mgbanwe ndị a n'ihe ndekọ ọnụ ọtụtụ afọ tupu satịlaịtị kwadoro.
igbo.cheapest_electricity_worldwide_in_2024: Eletrik kacha dị ọnụ ala n'ụwa na 2024. Ike na-abawanye okpukpu abụọ kwa afọ na mpaghara ọtụtụ.
igbo.cheapest_electricity_in_history_grid_i: Eletrik kacha dị ọnụ ala n'akụkọ ihe mere eme. Njikọ grid bụ isi ihe ịma aka ugbu a.
igbo.distributed_resilient_typical_5kw_syst: Ekesara + na-adịgide. Nlaghachi ego nke usoro 5kW nkịtị: afọ 6–10.
igbo.1_3_of_food_is_wasted_preventing_waste: 1/3 nke nri ka na-efunahụ. Igbochi mfu na-ezere methane site n'ebe mkpofu MA nkpọ iji zụọ nri.
igbo.not_100_vegan_even_cutting_beef_3_a_we: Ọ bụghị 100% vegan — ọbụna ibelata anụ ehi 3× kwa izu nwere mmetụta buru ibu. Na-atọhapụ ala maka ịkụghachi ọhịa.
igbo.restore_125m_hectares_protects_biodive: Weghachi hektaa 125M. Na-echebe ọdịdị iche iche + na-adọta CO₂ site na photosynthesis.
igbo.plant_where_natural_conditions_support: Kụọ ebe ọnọdụ okike na-akwado uto. Uru mgbakwunye: ime ka ọ dị jụụ, nchekwa mpaghara mmiri.
igbo.integrating_trees_into_grazing_land_li: Ijikọ osisi n'ala ịta nri. Anụ ụlọ na-enweta ndò; ala na-echekwa carbon 4× karịa ala ịta nri gba ọtọ.
igbo.no_till_cover_crops_diverse_rotations_: Enweghị ịkọ + ihe ọkụkụ mkpuchi + ntụgharị dị iche iche. Na-ewu carbon ala ka ọ na-ejigide mkpụrụ.
igbo.peatlands_store_3_more_carbon_than_for: Ala peat na-echekwa carbon 3× karịa ọhịa n'ụwa niile. Peat a kpọrọ nkụ = onye nnukwu na-ewepụta.
igbo.hfcs_are_1_000_9_000_more_potent_than_: Gas HFCs dị ike 1,000–9,000× karịa CO₂. Mgbanwe Kigali (2016) na-ewepụ ha nke nta nke nta.
igbo.evs_produce_50_70_less_lifetime_emissi: EV na-emepụta nkpọ ndụ dum 50–70% karịa mmanụ — na-akawanye mma ka grid na-adị ọcha.
igbo.electric_trains_move_a_passenger_km_at: Ụgbọ okporo ígwè eletrik na-ebugharị onye njem-km na 1/10 nke nkpọ ụgbọ ala.
igbo.dutch_cycling_cities_have_1_3_the_tran: Obodo igwe Dutch nwere 1/3 nke nkpọ njem. Akụrụngwa na-emepụta àgwà.
igbo.insulation_heat_pumps_led_lighting_us_: Insulation + nchekwa ọkụ + ọkụ LED. Ụlọ US na-eji 40% nke ike mbụ.
igbo.3_4_more_efficient_than_gas_furnaces_w: Dị mma 3–4× karịa furnace gas. Na-arụ ọrụ ruo −15°C na ụdị ihu igwe oyi ọgbara ọhụrụ.
igbo.girls_education_family_planning: Agụmakwụkwọ Ụmụ Nwaanyị na Nhazi Ezinụlọ
igbo.consistently_top_ranked_educated_women: Na-anọ n'elu mgbe niile. Ụmụ nwaanyị gụrụ akwụkwọ na-amụ ụmụ ole na ole MA na-ebi ndụ nwere mmetụta karịa. Na-agbakọ n'ọgbọ.
igbo.replaces_wood_charcoal_fires_benefits_: Na-anọchi ọkụ nkụ/unyi. Uru: ihu igwe + mmetọ ikuku ime ụlọ (na-egbu 4M/afọ) + igbutu ọhịa.
igbo.grows_60_faster_than_land_trees_seques: Na-eto 60× ọsọ karịa osisi ala. Na-echekwa CO₂ + na-eweghachi ịkụ azụ + fatịlaịza.
igbo.other_waste_fugitive_aviation_bunkers: Ndị ọzọ (mkpofu, mgbapụ, mmanụ ụgbọ elu na ụgbọ mmiri)
igbo.very_low_emissions_paris_aligned: Nkpọ Dị Ala Nke Ukwuu — Kwekọ Paris
igbo.low_emissions_strong_action: Nkpọ Dị Ala — Omume Siri Ike
igbo.very_high_fossil_fueled_growth: Dị Elu Nke Ukwuu — Uto Mmanụ Fossil Na-anya
igbo.walk_bike_or_bus_to_school: Jee ije, nya igwe, ma ọ bụ nya bọs gaa akwụkwọ
igbo.try_one_meatless_meal_per_week: Nwaa otu nri na-enweghị anụ kwa izu
igbo.talk_to_your_family_about_energy_choic: Gwa ezinụlọ gị maka nhọrọ ike
igbo.plant_a_tree_or_start_a_school_garden: Kụọ osisi ma ọ bụ malite ubi akwụkwọ
igbo.write_a_letter_to_your_representative: Dee akwụkwọ ozi nye onye nnọchite anya gị
igbo.climate_explorer_keyboard_shortcuts_1_: Climate Explorer. Ụzọ mkpirisi keyboard: 1 ruo 6 na-agbanwe taabụ, Q na-agbanwe ajụjụ.
igbo.export_your_climate_report_to_clipboar: Bupụ akụkọ ihu igwe gị na clipboard
igbo.hero_ppm: CO₂ taa: ~424 ppm — kacha elu n'ime afọ nde 3+
igbo.mission_panel_copy: Si na data nkeonwe gaa na ihe akaebe ụwa, ikpe ziri ezi, na ngwọta. Ụlọ nyocha amụma na mmanye dị elu na-anọgide ka ị na-agbasa ha.
igbo.hide_advanced_labs: Zoo ụlọ nyocha ọ ka elu
igbo.show_advanced_labs: Gosi ụlọ nyocha ọ ka elu
igbo.average_us_household_emits_16_tons_co_: Ezinụlọ US nkezi na-ewepụta ~ton 16 CO₂/afọ. Ngwa kacha ukwuu bụ ịkpo ụlọ ọkụ, njem, na nri — ọ bụghị mkpịsị plastik.
igbo.solar_wind_are_now_cheaper_than_new_fo: Anyanwụ + ifufe dị ọnụ ala ugbu a karịa ụlọ ọrụ fossil ọhụrụ n'ọtụtụ ahịa. Akụkụ siri ike bụ njikọ grid, ọ bụghị ọnụ ahịa mmepụta.
igbo.continuous_co_measurement_at_mauna_loa: Ọtụtụ CO₂ na-aga n'ihu na Mauna Loa kemgbe 1958 — ndekọ ikuku kacha ogologo na-arụ ọrụ. Ụkpụrụ eze mma sitere na photosynthesis nke Ọkara Ụwa Ugwu.
igbo.thresholds_where_the_system_shifts_sta: Oke ebe usoro na-agbanwe ọnọdụ ma nọgide ebe ahụ — mgbaze Greenland, mbelata Amazon, mbelata AMOC. Ọrụ nso nso a na-egosi na ọtụtụ nwere ike ịdị nso karịa ka echere.
igbo.the_countries_that_emitted_the_least_f: Mba ndị wepụtara opekempe na-eche mmetụta kacha njọ. Ihu igwe bụ okwu nha anya nke mbụ — adịghị ike na-eso ego, ọdịdị ala, na ọrụ akụkọ ihe mere eme.
igbo.drawdown_ranks_100_solutions_by_gigato: Drawdown na-ahazi ngwọta 100 site na gigatons nke CO₂ ezere. Refrigerant, mkpofu nri, na ịkụziri ụmụ nwaanyị nọ n'elu — ọ bụghị ihe ọtụtụ mmadụ na-eche.
igbo.climate_policy_pathways_40_year_maine_: Ụzọ Amụma Ihu Igwe: mgbasa ozi afọ 40 nke Maine
igbo.interactive_climate_explorer_carbon_fo: Ngosipụta chaatị donut nzọụkwụ carbon Climate Explorer nkwurịta
igbo.interactive_climate_explorer_emissions: Ngosipụta usoro oge nkpọ Climate Explorer nkwurịta
igbo.annual_global_co2_emission_rate: Ọnụọgụ nkpọ CO2 ụwa kwa afọ
igbo.locked_in_at_1_5_c_sustained_warming_m: Kpọchiri na ~1.5°C ọkụ na-adịgide. Ọtụtụ mmegharị ụsọ oké osimiri ka nwere ike site na mgbidi oké osimiri, nlaghachi azụ a chịkwara.
igbo.associated_with_2_5_c_warming_displace: Jikọtara na ~2.5°C ọkụ. Na-achụpụ mmadụ karịa agha ọ bụla n'akụkọ ihe mere eme. Mmiri iju oké ifufe na-aghọ ọdachi nye mpaghara ime obodo.
igbo.likely_by_2300_at_3_c_entire_nations_l: O yikarịrị ka ọ na-erule 2300 na 3°C. Mba dum na-atụfu ala mmadụ nwere ike ibi. New Orleans, Venice, na ọtụtụ Vietnam.
igbo.multi_century_commitment_at_4_c_warmin: Nkwenye ọtụtụ narị afọ na ọkụ 4°C. Chọrọ ọdịda Greenland + Ọdịda Anyanwụ Antarctica. A na-edegharị ọdịdị ala ụsọ oké osimiri nke mmepeanya mmadụ ruo mgbe ebighị ebi.
igbo.locked_in_with_greenland_most_of_west_: Kpọchiri na Greenland + ọtụtụ Ọdịda Anyanwụ Antarctica furu efu. Ụsọ oké osimiri na-ekpo ọkụ nke oge Pliocene. Narị afọ ruo puku afọ iji mezuo kpamkpam.
igbo.sea_level_rise_in_meters: Mmụba ọkwa oké osimiri na mita
igbo.cop28_note_25_of_all_historical_co: COP28 — rịba ama: ~25% nke CO₂ akụkọ ihe mere eme niile
igbo.record_year_pakistan_floods_alone_disp: Afọ ndekọ — naanị idei mmiri Pakistan chụpụrụ ~8.2M
igbo.welcome_the_people_the_climate_is_alre: Nabata ndị ihu igwe na-akwaga ugbua
igbo.pressure_the_loss_damage_fund_pledge_u: Manye ka nkwa Ego Mfu na Mmebi rịgoo
igbo.read_the_people_you_just_heard_from: Gụọ maka ndị ị nụrụ ozugbo
igbo.show_up_where_the_decisions_actually_g: Pụta ebe a na-eme mkpebi n'ezie
igbo.un_framework_convention_on_climate_cha: Nkwekọrịta Usoro UN gbasara Mgbanwe Ihu Igwe
igbo.aosis_proposes_loss_damage_at_cop1_ber: AOSIS tụpụtara Mfu na Mmebi na COP1 Berlin
igbo.idmc_begins_tracking_weather_displacem: IDMC malitere nlekọta mkwafe site na ihu igwe
igbo.paris_agreement_article_8_mentions_l_d: Nkwekọrịta Paris — Nkeji edemede 8 kwuru L&D
igbo.un_hrc_teitiota_v_new_zealand_ruling: Mkpebi UN HRC Teitiota v. New Zealand
igbo.world_bank_groundswell_part_ii_report: Akụkọ World Bank Groundswell Akụkụ II
igbo.cop27_sharm_el_sheikh_l_d_fund_created: COP27 Sharm el-Sheikh — e kere Ego L&D
igbo.cop28_dubai_l_d_fund_capitalized: COP28 Dubai — e nyere Ego L&D ego
igbo.pick_the_biggest_impact_solution: Họrọ ngwọta nwere mmetụta kacha ukwuu
igbo.no_major_political_or_climate_event_ro: Enweghị nnukwu ihe omume ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị ma ọ bụ ihu igwe. Ọrụ amụma nkịtị gara n'ihu.
igbo.net_zero_plus_equity: Efu Zuru Ezu na Nha Anya
igbo.you_hit_deep_decarbonization_across_se: I ruru mwepụ carbon miri emi n'ọtụtụ ngalaba, wuo nnagide, ma debe nha anya n'etiti. Otu a ka mgbanwe ihu igwe nke gara nke ọma na-adị mgbe nkwekọrịta ọha na-ejigide.
igbo.decarbonized_but_uneven: Ewepụrụ Carbon mana Ọ Naghị Ahụ Otu
igbo.significant_decarbonization_across_the: Mwepụ carbon dị ukwuu n'ngalaba ike na njem, mana mmegharị na ikpe ziri ezi dara azụ. Curve carbon ziri ezi; njikọ ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị na-adịghị ike.
igbo.some_sectors_moved_others_stalled_publ: Ụfọdụ ngalaba gara n'ihu. Ndị ọzọ kwụsịrị. Nkwado ọha kwụsịrị site n'oge. Nke a bụ ụzọ nke ọtụtụ amụma ihu igwe nke ụwa n'ezie gbaara.
igbo.decarbonization_stalled_adaptation_gap: Mwepụ carbon kwụsịrị. Oghere mmegharị gbasaara. Nkwado ọha dara. Nke a bụ ụzọ anyị na-agbalị izere: mmetụta ihu igwe na-agbakọ na-enweghị akụrụngwa ọha ma ọ bụ nka iji zaghachi.
igbo.initial_conditions_are_workable_spread: Ọnọdụ mbụ nwere ike ịrụ ọrụ. Kesaa ego n'ngalaba 2-3 na oge mbụ iji chọpụta iwu nzaghachi ndị na-abụ ụzọ mbụ. Agụmakwụkwọ ọha + nzukọ ụmụ amaala na-akwụ ụgwọ nwayọọ mana na-adịgide.
igbo.positive_feedback_dominates_earth_warm: Nzaghachi dị mma na-achị; Ụwa na-ekpo ọkụ ruo nguzozi na-ekpo ọkụ karịa. (Ezigbo greenhouse “na-apụghị ịchịkwa” — oké osimiri na-agbọ ma na-esi anwụ — bụ ọnọdụ Venus, ọ bụghị Ụwa na mmanye ndị a.)
igbo.rapid_cooling: 🧊 Ime ka ọ dị jụụ ngwa ngwa
igbo.high_albedo_negative_feedback_ice_age_: Albedo dị elu + nzaghachi na-adịghị mma. Ụzọ oge ice.
igbo.net_forcing_0_w_m_earth_equilibrium: Mmanye zuru ezu ≈ 0 W/m². Nguzozi Ụwa.
igbo.forcings_partially_offset_climate_slow: Mmanye na-ekpochapụ onwe ha n'akụkụ. Ihu igwe na-akụ nwayọọ nwayọọ.
igbo.energy_balance_diagram_shortwave_sunli: Eserese nguzozi ike: ìhè anyanwụ mkpirikpi na-agafe n'oyi gas greenhouse ma na-ekpo elu ọkụ; elu na-ewepụta infrared, nke oyi gas na-emikpu ụfọdụ ma na-ewepụtaghachi ala, na-ejide okpomọkụ.
igbo.hypothesis_when_does_albedo_overcome_g: Echiche: Kedu mgbe albedo na-emeri mmanye GHG?
igbo.explain_how_albedo_cloud_feedback_and_: Kọwaa otu albedo, nzaghachi igwe ojii, na GHGs si na-anya ọnọdụ ihu igwe ọnụ.
